case_number: Criminal Misc. Application No. S-385 of 2023

chunks.text: 1 IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Criminal Misc. Application No. S-385 of 2023 (Muhammad Fayaz Vs. The State & others) For directions O R D E R. 06-02-2024. None for the applicant. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional P.G for the State. _______*******__________ The instant Crl. Misc. Application is being fixed before the Court for want of execution of P.R bond by the applicant to ensure safety of Mst. Javeria, the alleged detenue; which could not be executed timely; same to be executed by the applicant on service of notice before Additional Registrar of this Court without the matter being fixed before the Court. J U D G E Nasim/P.A
